title: Maximizing ROI: LMND's $3 IFP from $1 Ad Spend
text: Lemonade maximizing ROI with $3 in-force premium from $1 advertising spend. Marketing efficiency impressive: earn $3 premium for every $1 spent advertising, with 24-month payback period and over 90% return on investment. Sales marketing approach designed efficiency, maintaining Lifetime Value Customer Acquisition Cost (LTV/CAC) ratio above 3:1, indicating strong return investment customer acquisition efforts. Recent customer acquisition costs: marketing expenses 2023 totaled $79.3 million, customer acquisition cost $327 per new customer. More recently, Q1 2025: invested $43.2 million sales marketing, notable increase from $30.4 million Q1 2024. Innovative partnership strategy: General Catalyst finance 80% CAC, receive commission up 16% customers signing policies capped rate, after which 100% remaining stream accrues Lemonade. AI-driven efficiency: company employs AI customer acquisition, achieving triple-digit Customer Acquisition Cost internal rate return, supporting sustained customer growth. Customers obtain quotes various insurance types under 90 seconds through AI chatbots. Strategic efficiency: company maintains spending leverage while growing customer base profitably.
